title: Sanji Returns to Luffy
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Capone Bege, Sanji, Luffy, Jinbe, Big Mom, Bege as Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the assassination plot against Big Mom begins taking shape.
scene: Sanji and Luffy reunite emotionally, turning the rescue mission into a direct conspiracy against Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy. I already talked about this with everyone on this side, but...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Forgive me for changing the subject but there's something you need to hear.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Do you know of Capone "Gang" Bege?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yeah. He's the guy who made off with Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: right. He's one of the "worst generation". In other words, one of your contemptempo- raries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In his native west blue, there are five enormous mafias which have the underworld of the entire sea under their control.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "The five great families"... and of the five bosses of those mafias, one of them is none other than "gang" Bege himself!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The moniker "Gang" comes from the rem- Nants of his younger days...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and he was one crazy whisper. He became Infa- mous as a loose cannon, y'see...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've heard that he's the sort of man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who'd cut off animals heads and laugh as he watched their writing bodies...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Shuder

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: WHAT?! That's beyond terrible...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And if you change "animals" to "organizations", they met the very same fate at his hands...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even back in his younger days, he was already gunning for the heads of the bosses of the underworld.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even if they commanded an entire family, he'd go straight for the head of any boss who dared resist him, and no one else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But in spite of all that, he showed no interest in improving his status or acquiring territory.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He stole money and precious items, and nothing else.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From then on, he sat back and watched the blood-soaked struggles for power.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He merely laughed as he watched the powers that be in the under- world panic.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: saying he's a man with bad taste would be an under- statement.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: However, in this world, it's eye-for- an-eye...!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: before long, those who would seek revenge on him came for his head in droves!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and yet, that was all fun and games for bege.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He had an "iron-clad fortress" awaiting them, and sent them packing with their tails between their legs, laughing all the while.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and once he grew bored of his dominance, he set out to the seas. But his methodologies didn't change.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: He quickly gained infamy by taking only the heads of renowned pirate captains, but leaving their crews intact!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And? Why are you telling this to all of us now, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even when he journeyed out to sea... he was continuously chased by those seeking revenge.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And to someone like that, there's no better hiding place than under the umbrella of a yonko...! So bege became a subordinate of big mom's.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: There are several

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And now, his sharpened wariness,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: In addition to his defensive prowess, have had their value acknowledged,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: And, as of this tea party,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He's finally earned the title of "ROOK" as a combatant in big mom's forces,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and has been given full authority over the security detail of the event.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: since he and his men will be on guard duty, that means...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: THERE WILL BE NO ONE TO GET IN HIS WAY...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Anyone seems

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the main event of this tea party is the wedding ceremony...'

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And, as you know, big mom is planning on slaughtering every one of the Vinsmokes at that ceremony...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and obtaining all of the germa for herself! But, amidst all the festivities...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Bee...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: intends to take big mom's head then and there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: WhAAA AAAAA A-T?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Sanji Returns storyline with 45 dialogue beats. Sanji chooses to return to Luffy, and the crew joins Bege’s risky plan to attack Big Mom during the tea party.
